---
title: "ResolveKit iOS SDK"
---
ResolveKit iOS SDK - Embedded AI resolution framework for iOS/macOS.

Key files:
- README.md: Integration guide and API reference
- CHANGELOG.md: Version history
- Sources/ResolveKitUI/ResolveKitRuntime.swift: Main runtime
- Sources/ResolveKitAuthoring/ResolveKitAuthoring.swift: @ResolveKit macro declaration
- Sources/ResolveKitMacros/ResolveKitMacro.swift: Macro implementation

Quick start: Add SPM dependency, use @ResolveKit macro on functions, present ResolveKitChatView.
Requires: iOS 15+, Swift 5.9+
